<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
if last_transition:
    before_seg = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
    after_seg = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation
    
    print("=== Before ===")
    for node in before_seg['nodes']:
        if node['color'] in ('Y', 'N') and node['pixels'] > 9:
            print(f"{node['color']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
    
    print("\n=== After ===")
    for node in after_seg['nodes']:
        if node['color'] in ('Y', 'N') and node['pixels'] > 9:
            print(f"{node['color']}: pixels={node['pixels']}, boundary={node['boundary']}")
    
    # Check ASCII diff
    before_ascii = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    after_ascii = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
    for i, (b, a) in enumerate(zip(before_ascii, after_ascii)):
        if b != a:
            print(f"\nRow {i}:")
            print(f"  Before: {b}")
            print(f"  After:  {a}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
